---
title: "PAAR: BLIZZARD"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br> 
**B**LANCHARD'S **L**ARGE **I**CE ISLAND **Z**ONE **Z**APS **A**MERICA LEADING TO **R**ETALIATION THROUGH **D**EICING

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 


**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 


**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 


**REMARKS** <br> 


**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br> 
████████████████████ - DAZZLING FIREWORKS - KIA <br>
████████████████████ - LANCED BULL - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - STEAM GAZELLE - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - BLINK HARE - ACTIVE <br>


https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-Blanchards_winter.html
